_comment: Microsoft Intune custom configuration policy for AgentDR on Windows. Import as a Custom Settings Catalog policy. Values target the AgentDR service which reads %ProgramData%\AgentDR\config.toml; this policy delivers a managed config file via a Win32 app or PowerShell remediation. Pair with the signed .msi shipped from CI.
description: CoSAI AgentDR endpoint telemetry agent (Tier 1 OTLP + MCP capture)

simpleSettingValue.value:
watch_directories = ["C:\\Users"]

[otlp]
enabled = true
bind = "127.0.0.1:4318"
redact_content = true

[mcp]
inventory_on_start = true
rescan_seconds = 600

[server_push]
enabled = true
endpoint = "https://agentdr.example.com/api/sync"
api_key = "INTUNE-MANAGED-KEY"
batch_size = 50
flush_interval_seconds = 10

remediation_script: $cfg = '$(settings[0].settingInstance.simpleSettingValue.value)'; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path 'C:\ProgramData\AgentDR' | Out-Null; Set-Content -Path 'C:\ProgramData\AgentDR\config.toml' -Value $cfg -Encoding ASCII; Restart-Service AgentDR -Force
